title: Brooklyn Marine Terminal comment period extended by city at last minute
summary:
The decision came at the last minute: Tuesday had been the original deadline to submit written testimony on the project’s Draft Scope of Work.

The post Brooklyn Marine Terminal comment period extended by city at last minute appeared first on Brooklyn Eagle.
author: Mary Frost

title: Four Horsemen, Whoopsie Daisy score James Beard Award noms
summary:
The James Beard Awards, which recognize America’s best restaurants and food industry professionals, released their 2026 nominees on Tuesday.

title: Sex chocolates recalled for undisclosed generic Viagra, Cialis
summary:
Gear Isle is voluntarily recalling Gold Lion Aphrodisiac Chocolate Sachet (UPC 795847916279), and Sex Chocolate (UPC 1002448578911).
